ItacPersonItem.Notes: Dates referring to the year when President of the Academy. This Giasone was, possibly, the brother of Camillo and Pompeo Vizzani, and was member of the Oziosi Academy in Bologna. His name recurs in letters addressed to Camillo and Pompeo Vizzani in the Ranuzzi MSS at the Harry Ransom Center, Ph 12670.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
